text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It's the Fan Fest! Let the Grand Confession
Contest begin! Awooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once a year, Umamusume fans are invited to the
academy for the Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka has decided to participate in one of this
year's contests.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
"Um! To be honest, I... really admire you. Can we
start by being friends?"

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, Daiwa Scarlet! Spoken like a real model
student. That confession deserves a high score!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. You're so full of crap. Like you'd ever say
something like that.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Keep your mouth shut... It's a contest, so I just
need to win.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: Next up is Vodka. Confess away!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
"Don't worry about the details. Just gimme your
trust and stick with me!"

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, another confession full of character!
Another one worth a high score!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After all the excitement dies down...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I think I'm gonna tell my fans about my
plans movin' forward.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It might turn 'em off, but you'll stay by my side,
right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I meet Vodka's gaze and give her a slight nod.
After the contest, the interviews start.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
That was a pretty courageous approach from you,
Daiwa Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It was. ♪ I'm not really the type to put myself out
there. Not in my daily life or while racing.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
So I thought it would be better to start sma—I
mean, take the road to number one, one step at a
time.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: And how about you, Vodka?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, before talkin' about the contest, there's
something I wanna say to everyone.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: It's about... my future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vodka looks around the venue.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
As you saw during the contest, I'm not good at
playin' by the rules.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But I gave it a try. I thought maybe I could settle
down and take things steady like Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But it was no good. I can't help but follow my
heart and do what I think is cool.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If I can't even do that, then what's the point of
living? I'd lose sight of who I really am. That's
why...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I have no idea what races I'll run in from here on
out. I might suddenly change my mind and let
some of ya down.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But that's who I am. I've got my own reasons. If I
can't stay true to 'em, I'll probably just burn out.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
So... even if it doesn't make a ton of sense, will ya
stick with me anyways?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You... are the ones who shared your dream with
me. So just watch, and I'll make it come true.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: That is what I really wanted to confess to you. So uh, yeah.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: WOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
I think we have a winner! This year's confession
contest goes to Vodka!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What?! But that had nothing to do with the
contest!

text_block_list.name: Male Fan A
text_block_list.text: Yeahhh! Vodkaaa!

text_block_list.name: Male Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I wanna see you run like you did at the Derby
again!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: WOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Th-they actually...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Maybe they care about more than just an
Umamusume bein' strong.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Maybe they care about... my way of seein' things
too.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. With fans like them backin' me, I've got
nothin' to be afraid of.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
In my next race, the Victoria Mile, I'll show you all
my new treasure!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan A
text_block_list.text: Hey, Vodkaaa! Make my dreams come true too!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan B
text_block_list.text: Me too! Me too! Make them come true!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh? What? Whoa! W-wait a sec!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: That's not what I meant! H-hey!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka once again feels the blessing of having
fans. Although, there are always those few who
go too far.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Encore! Encore!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Encore? Wh-what're you talkin' about?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka's surprised by the sudden eruption of
cheers. When you have a lot of fans, their
enthusiasm can be overwhelming.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whaddya even want me to say?! It's not like I'm
some entertainer!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Y-you have any ideas, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that simple suggestion, Vodka nods and
returns to the stage.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
So... I came out and spilled my guts, but there's
someone here who wasn't completely honest
about her feelings.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Scarlet, bare your soul as well. You're completely
different when we're alone in our dorm.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Wh-what?

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Are we about to hear some juicy
roommate secrets?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, everyone. Sure, Scarlet's always actin'
like a model student. But in reality, she wants—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
—to be the most-loved Umamusume of all! ♪ So,
I hope you'll all keep supporting me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
What the?! S-Scarlet! You're just gonna keep
fakin' it?! I'm competin' as my real self!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Whatever are you talking about? I have nooo
idea. ♪ The number one thing I want right now is
to keep you quiet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sudden, strangely menacing act is a big hit
with the audience. Vodka has managed to give
them a suitable encore.
